_meta.description: SVM-configurable values, CORRECTED to MAX4 effective 2026-01-01. Supersedes svm-config.json (which was built on the stale 2025 edition). Nulls await input; '_pending' marks values being extracted from the 2026 tariff (see docs/SPEC-AUDIT-2026.md). Edited via Settings, not code.

company._territory_source: Item 210 — Santa Clara County is Territory A. Packing labor uses origin territory, unpacking uses destination territory (Item 340 Note 3). See data/2026/territories.csv.

pricing._discount_exclusion_source: Item 24 NOTE — 'may quote lower than max' does NOT apply to Item 32 or Item 140 Note 3, etc.
pricing._min_weight_note: SVM business minimum; confirm against any tariff minimum-weight basis (Item 310 lowest bracket / Item 80).
pricing._min_miles_source: Item 16(1)(b): distance rates mandatory 'in excess of 100 miles'; block routes <= 100
pricing._distance_basis_source: Item 40 (2026): constructive miles = shortest public-highway route via the Distance Table OR a GPS navigation tool/platform. GPS (e.g. Google Distance Matrix shortest-highway) is now a PERMITTED pricing basis; Distance Table 8 is no longer a hard dependency. Never fabricate a mileage.
pricing._materials_tax_note: Santa Clara County / San Jose point-of-sale rate (Joey, 2026-06-24). Item 340 Note 9: container sale prices EXCLUDE sales tax; tax applies to materials only, not labor. Re-confirm with accountant / CDTFA if the rate changes.

rounding._percentage_source: Item 32 Disposition of Fractions — applies to discount % and the 65% penalty calc only
rounding._weight_round_note: Spec's 'round weight to next 100 lb' is NOT grounded in Item 32. Weight feeds the Item 310 minimum-weight bracket + published Break Point. Re-ground or remove.

valuation._legal_default_warning: VERIFY (ambiguous in tariff). Two readings: (1) Item 136 para 1 bases the line-haul rate on $0.60/lb released value, so 'default Released' may be correct with $20,000 ACV as the no-declaration liability CAP; (2) NOTE 3 + para 6 frame ACV-$20k as the no-declaration default and attach the $1.12/$100 ACV rate to it (=> chargeable, not free). Resolve with SVM/BHGS before launch. Either way: do NOT silently book 'Released $0' without a recorded, signed valuation election.
valuation._min_declared_source: Item 136 imposes NO mandatory floor. A minimum per-lb valuation is OPTIONAL and SVM-set; if elected it must be stated on the Agreement (Item 128 NOTE 3). Reclassify as CONFIG, not a tariff value to look up.

tiers.label: Full Value Protection, shipper holds first $250 of claim
Full Value Protection, shipper holds first $500 of claim

flight_long_carry.source: Item 140 para 1 — 2026 ($2.26/100lb; was $1.75). Note 3: charge on weight of articles carried, non-discountable per Item 24 NOTE.

shuttle.source: Item 184 para 3 — charged at Item 320 hourly rates (Territory A/B), NOT flat. Rates pending Item 320 extraction.

piano_fee._note: SVM special-handling fee, separate from Item 140 piano flights.

bulky_fee._source: Item 164 — tariff names bulky articles + sets max loading/unloading charge or weight additive. CONFIG must cap at Item 164 max. Article table pending extraction.

extra_stop._source: Items 148/152/156 — distance-rated: composite-weight line haul + not more than $134.45 per extra stop. CONFIG caps at $134.45.

disassembly_reassembly._source: Item 172 — outdoor/unusual articles (pool tables, swing sets, waterbeds) at Item 320 hourly. Schema hook; off in v1.

appliance_servicing._source: Item 176 — out of scope v1 (Territory A/B rates exist if needed)

packing.labor_rates_source: Item 340 — Territory A/B; per-container + per-hour. Rates pending extraction to data/2026/item340_*.csv
packing._note: Item 340 Note 9: container sale prices EXCLUDE sales tax. Item 340 is IN the 2026 tariff (not external).

data_sources_2026._note: Spec §4 wrongly classified Item 310/340 as external. Only Distance Table 8 is truly external. See docs/SPEC-AUDIT-2026.md §5.
